hero.subtitle: Join the premium fitness experience. Certified trainers, state-of-the-art equipment, and a community that pushes you further.

about.description: At 26fitnessClub, we believe in pushing boundaries. Our premium facility offers everything you need to transform your body and mind in an aesthetic, mood-lit environment.

programs.title: Aerobics
programs.description: Aerobics is a high-energy cardio workout that combines rhythmic movements with upbeat music to improve heart health and stamina. By keeping your heart rate elevated, it effectively burns calories while boosting overall flexibility and coordination. It’s a fun, social way to stay fit that leaves you feeling energized and revitalized after every session.

programs.title: CrossFit
programs.description: CrossFit is a high-intensity strength and conditioning program that blends elements of weightlifting, gymnastics, and cardio for a total body transformation. It focuses on functional movements—like squatting, pulling, and pushing—to build real-world power, speed, and endurance. Beyond the workout, it’s built on a supportive community that motivates you to push past your limits and achieve peak athletic performance.

programs.title: Personal Training
programs.description: Personal training offers a customized fitness roadmap designed specifically for your unique goals, body type, and current fitness level. With a dedicated trainer by your side, you receive expert technical guidance to ensure every movement is performed safely and with maximum efficiency. It provides the ultimate level of accountability and motivation, helping you stay consistent and break through plateaus to reach your peak potential.

programs.title: Cycling
programs.description: Cycling is a high-octane cardiovascular workout that builds incredible lower-body strength while being remarkably gentle on your joints. Whether you’re climbing virtual hills or sprinting to the beat, it effectively boosts your endurance and lung capacity in an immersive environment. The rhythmic pedaling and shared energy of a class create a powerful sense of focus and stress relief, leaving you feeling both exhausted and exhilarated.

programs.title: Yoga Classes
programs.description: Yoga classes offer a perfect blend of physical postures and breathwork designed to enhance flexibility, balance, and core strength. By focusing on the mind-body connection, it provides a powerful sanctuary for stress relief and mental clarity amidst a busy lifestyle. Whether you are seeking a vigorous flow or deep relaxation, it is a journey of self-discovery and holistic wellness that leaves you feeling centered.

programs.title: Gym
programs.description: The gym is a powerhouse of strength and transformation, providing the professional equipment and space you need to sculpt your body and boost your health. From high-intensity cardio to heavy weightlifting, it offers a diverse range of training options to keep your routine effective and engaging. It’s more than just a place to sweat; it’s a disciplined environment where your consistency meets your goals to build a stronger, more confident you.

videoGallery.title: Beast Mode: Full Body Workout
videoGallery.description: Follow along with Elite Trainer Marcus for a high-intensity full body smash session.

videoGallery.title: Advanced HIIT Cardio
videoGallery.description: Burn maximum calories in minimum time with this intense 20-minute guided cardio routine.

videoGallery.title: Master the Deadlift
videoGallery.description: Learn the perfect form to prevent injury and lift heavier in this detailed tutorial.

videoGallery.title: 10-Minute Core Crunch
videoGallery.description: A quick, equipment-free core routine you can do anywhere to build functional strength.

testimonials.text: i relly liked this gym the trainers are very good and they are very helpful and they will guide you in every step of your fitness journey.
testimonials.name: Alexendra Cirnes
testimonials.subtitle: Lost 30 lbs, gained confidence

testimonials.text: Good place to workout. Neat and clean. Trainers are good, staff is good. Machines are almost new and in good condition. Machines are limited, this maybe due to shortage of space. You may check the photos posted by me to know what all machines are there. They will take you on trekking and do inhouse competition as well once in a month. Overall a good place to workout.
testimonials.name: Harsh Arora
testimonials.subtitle: Strength Athlete

testimonials.text: This gym is one of the best I’ve joined. It’s clean, well maintained and has all the modern equipment needed for a complete workout. The trainer is extremely professional, patient and skilled. I’ve gained confidence and results because of his guidance. Highly recommended to anyone serious about fitness.”😊😊
testimonials.name: Rukhsana Gupta
testimonials.subtitle: Yoga Enthusiast

testimonials.text: Gym is all about equipments and trainer who can guide you in this journey of fitness and I found this gym good in both the aspects. Moreover, they teach yoga and organise interesting treks once in a month. They keep launching exclusive offers occasionally on gym membership. They do have locker facility and gym fee is also reasonable. Highly recommended 💪🏼💪🏼
testimonials.name: Vipin Negi
testimonials.subtitle: Personal Training Client

footer.description: Premium fitness experience designed to transform your life.
